basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Guest Faculty Posts
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University has released the official Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the Delhi University Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing a Master's degree with 55% marks (50% for reserved categories) in the relevant subject along with NET qualification (except for Italian posts) are eligible to apply offline on or before 27 July 2026. The age limit details are available in the official notification. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in concerned/relevant/allied subject (50% for reserved categories) and NET (exempted for Italian posts)
qualification.details: French, German, Spanish, Italian: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade in a point-scale) in concerned/relevant/allied subject (50% for reserved categories), National Eligibility Test (NET) (exempted in case of Italian posts).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Delhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Delhi University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: French, German, Spanish, Italian: Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent grade in a point-scale) in concerned/relevant/allied subject (50% for reserved categories), National Eligibility Test (NET) (exempted in case of Italian posts).

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Delhi University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Guest Faculty posts at Delhi University is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Guest Faculty at Delhi University?
faq.answer: Delhi University is recruiting for a total of 9 Guest Faculty positions across various language departments.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks (50% for reserved categories) in the relevant subject and have qualified the National Eligibility Test (NET).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Guest Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Guest Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculty positions will be as per UGC norms.

faq.question: Q7. Which departments are hiring Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Guest Faculty positions in French, German, Spanish, and Italian departments.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an age limit for applying?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Guest Faculty positions will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be found through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
